arxiv_papers.title: Analyzing Defensive Misdirection Against Model-Guided Automated Attacks on Agentic AI Systems
arxiv_papers.snippet: Agentic AI systems increasingly rely on language-model components to interpret instructions, process external data, invoke tools, and coordinate with other agents. These capabilities make prompt-injection and jailbreak attacks more consequential, especially as attackers adopt model-guided automation
